title: verify_health_endpoint_public_readiness
description: Test GET /api/health responds successfully and includes readiness status fields.

title: verify_checkout_get_is_method_not_allowed
description: Test GET /api/whop/checkout returns 405 Method Not Allowed with Allow: POST header.

title: verify_team_checkout_get_is_method_not_allowed
description: Test GET /api/whop/checkout-team returns 405 Method Not Allowed with Allow: POST header.

title: verify_unsubscribe_requires_signed_token
description: Test GET /api/email/unsubscribe without required token/email params fails with controlled 4xx response.

title: verify_welcome_webhook_requires_authorization
description: Test POST /api/email/welcome without valid webhook auth fails with 401 Unauthorized.

title: verify_cron_route_rejects_unauthorized_requests
description: Test GET /api/cron without authorization header is rejected with auth failure (401/403).

title: verify_cron_route_handles_missing_service_secret_deterministically
description: Test GET /api/cron with auth header but missing server secret returns deterministic service configuration error (503), not generic 500.

title: verify_health_details_require_service_auth_when_private
description: Test GET /api/health hides detailed diagnostics unless valid service auth is provided when public detail exposure is disabled.
